title: resume
description: Sent by a viewer device after `hello` completes (on a fresh connection or a reconnect) to ask the server to bring it up to date. The server responds with exactly one `delta` (if it can replay from last_revision) or exactly one `snapshot` (if the gap is too large, history is unavailable, or last_revision is 0). See SPEC.md 'Client resume flow'. A source device does not send resume for its own outbound queue: it simply re-sends any unacked task.event/message.event it holds (see SPEC.md 'Agent reconnect replay flow').

last_revision.description: The space_revision this viewer last fully applied. 0 means the viewer holds no prior state and always yields a snapshot.
